input.task_spec_body:
## §1 Goal

Add `--quiet` flag to bake CLI.

## §3 Acceptance

- Flag suppresses INFO logs; WARN+ still emitted.
- Default path unchanged.
- Per-step timing emitted on stderr when set.

## §4 Implementation Plan

1. Parse `--quiet` in CLI entry.
2. Set log filter when set.
sibling_task_titles: Wire verbose log sink + timing emit

plan_fix_tuples.summary: §3 acceptance bullet `Per-step timing emitted on stderr when set` not covered by any §4 step.
plan_fix_tuples.suggested_fix: Add §4 step: wire timing sink to stderr when `--quiet` set, OR remove the timing bullet from §3 (probably belongs to verbose-sink sibling task).
